india_trends.title: SIP mania remains strong despite poor show from Nifty bulls: What could impact investor confidence going ahead?
india_trends.summary: Nifty 50 has risen even less than 2% in the last 24 months, challenging investor patience at a time when the global market performance has remained strong. Asian peers and US markets are trading at or close to record high levels.

india_trends.title: How US’ dumb money became most influential force on Wall Street, explains Ruchir Sharma
india_trends.summary: Retail investors in the US have shifted from being seen as “dumb money” to a powerful market force, consistently profiting by buying dips. Their resilience has been strong enough to influence professional investors, who are increasingly taking cues from retail behavior.

india_trends.title: Hero MotoCorp Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Auto major trades flat ahead of earnings, dividend — What to expect?
india_trends.summary: Hero MotoCorp Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Brokerages expect Hero MotoCorp to post a strong set of numbers, driven by high volumes, a rise in average selling prices and export market expansion. According to their estimates, both revenue and profit could jump in double-digits on a year-on-year basis.

india_trends.title: M&M Q4 Results: Standalone PAT jumps 53% YoY to Rs 3,737 crore; Rs 33/share dividend declared
india_trends.summary: M&M Q4 Results: M&M board also recommended a final dividend of Rs 33 per ordinary equity share of face value Rs 5 each, for FY26. The record date for the final dividend shall be Friday, July 03, 2026.

india_trends.summary: Oil edged lower, paring Monday’s gain, as traders tracked tensions in the Middle East after fresh clashes between the US and Iran.

india_trends.title: Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw names niece as successor, but she is ‘not hanging up boots yet’; who is Claire Mazumdar?
india_trends.summary: Kiran Mazumdar of Biocon names her niece, Claire Mazumdar, as her successor, with a gradual transition over five years. She remains focused on advancing biotechnology and AI integration within the company while preparing for growth.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Shockproof India? Tops emerging market resilience charts as peers play catch-up: Moody’s Ratings
india_trends.summary: Since the onset of global economic challenges in 2020, India has emerged as a powerhouse among developing markets. india_trends.summary: ​Nvidia pivots beyond China as CEO Jensen Huang warns that export restrictions are reshaping the global AI power balance.​

india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea, HFCL, JP Power, HCC, Meesho, Ola Electric Mobility among the most traded stocks today, 5 May 2026
india_trends.summary: Most traded stocks today: Vodafone Idea, HFCL, Jaiprakash Power Ventures (JP Power), Meesho, Ola Electric Mobility, Hindustan Construction Company (HCC), and Vedanta were among the most traded stocks, or most active stocks in terms of volume, on the NSE on Tuesday.

india_trends.title: BSE SME stock hits 5% upper circuit despite Indian stock market sell-off
india_trends.summary: HRS Aluglaze's stock hit the 5% upper circuit at ₹225.75 on May 5, despite market declines. The company secured a ₹1.31 crore work order for aluminium windows from PSP Projects, enhancing its order book and revenue visibility over the next four months.

india_trends.title: Indo-Pacific trade pact losing relevance under Trump’s aggressive strategy: GTRI
india_trends.summary: The Indo-Pacific Economic Framework for Prosperity, widely known as IPEF, faces significant hurdles. Recent analyses indicate that the foundation of the framework may be weakening, largely attributed to the trade policies introduced during Donald Trump’s presidency.
